---
listing:
  - id: handson
    contents: Hands-on_Ex/*.qmd
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    fields: [image, date, title, description]

  - id: inclass
    contents: In Class Exercise/*.qmd
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    fields: [image, date, title, description]

  - id: takehome
    contents: Take-home_Ex/*.qmd
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    fields: [image, date, title, description]
---

```{=html}
<div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px 0 10px 0;">
  <p style="font-family: 'Georgia', serif;
             font-size: 0.85rem; 
             color: #555555;
             letter-spacing: 0.18em;
             text-transform: uppercase;
             margin-bottom: 8px;">
    Welcome to my
  </p>
  <img src="images/welcome-text.png" 
       alt="Visual Analytics Journey" 
       style="max-width: 350px; width: 60%;"/>
</div>
```

### Welcome
Hi, I am **Carina** and welcome to my course portfolio for **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications**.

---

![](images/handson-exercise-label.jpeg)

::: {#handson}
:::

---

![](images/inclass-exercise-label.jpeg)

::: {#inclass}
:::

---

![](images/takehome-exercise-label.jpeg)

::: {#takehome}
:::
